resources.string: Bypasses system restrictions to lock refresh rate to 120Hz for all apps.
Writes global task_stack_view_layout_style 2 for supported System Launcher and POCO Launcher builds. Turning it off deletes the global setting.
Launches com.android.settings.fuelgauge.PowerModeSettings when the activity exists on the device.
Sets persist.sys.computility.cpulevel. 0 = stock/off, 1-2 = light boost, 3 = balanced, 4-5 = high, 6 = maximum CPU performance tier on supported HyperOS builds.
Sets persist.sys.computility.gpulevel. 0 = stock/off, 1-2 = light graphics boost, 3 = balanced, 4-5 = high, 6 = maximum GPU/UI animation tier on supported HyperOS builds.
Revokes WRITE_SETTINGS and RUN_IN_BACKGROUND for com.miui.powerkeeper. Completely stops the aggressive killing of background apps.
Modifies device_config activity_manager max_phantom_processes. Higher limits help heavy multitasking, terminal sessions, and emulators stay alive.
Removes Facebook and network-heavy services from Doze exemption to fix severe idle discharge (battery drain when screen is off).
Sets Google Play Services to rare standby bucket to prevent constant awakening loops (wakelocks).
UI-only helper from the notes: dial *#*#86583#*#* in the Phone app to toggle carrier VoLTE checks.
Disables background analytic daemons (msa.global and miui.daemon) to protect privacy and save resources.
Tap to collapse. These options are experimental and hidden by default.
Hidden by default. Tap to expand advanced visual flags.

Experimental: these texture, blur, corner, and shadow flags can cause visual glitches, missing effects, lag, launcher issues, or no visible change on some HyperOS builds. They are not included in presets. Enable only one option at a time if you are testing.
Triggers service call miui.mqsas.IMQSNative 21 to enable advanced transparency (blur) across the Control Center and folders.
Sets persist.sys.advanced_visual_release. Higher values target newer HyperOS visual stacks and may be ignored or unstable on unsupported builds.
Sets persist.sys.support_view_smoothcorner. Improves rounded corner rendering for supported HyperOS UI views.
Sets persist.sys.support_window_smoothcorner. Applies smoother rounded corners to system windows where the ROM supports it.
Writes persist.sys.mi_shadow_supported to enable richer HyperOS interface shadows.
Sets persist.sys.background_blur_status_default. Makes supported blur surfaces default to enabled.
Sets persist.sys.add_blurnoise_supported. Adds the noise/glass texture layer used by some HyperOS blur effects.
Writes deviceLevelList v:1,c:3,g:3. Can unlock folder blur, lock-screen visual animation, and launcher visual tiers.
Writes secure linkage_state 1. Reddit guide pairs it with the advanced texture stack on supported HyperOS builds.
Save the current HyperOS tuning state as a named preset and apply it later.
Name this HyperOS tuning preset. The current device state will be captured when you save.
Could not read current device state
Command failed for an unknown reason
